meta.title: HSE Renewables — Weather-Threshold Working Limits
meta.subtitle: Wind Farm WF-7, turbine-access weather limits
meta.author: HSE Renewables
meta.deid_notice: All personnel are referred to by role label. Identifiers were pseudonymised before drafting; the re-identification key is held separately and is not part of this document.

sections.text: This review defines the weather-threshold working limits for turbine access and blade work at wind farm WF-7. Two activities lacked a documented wind-speed stop limit, now corrected.

sections.caption: Weather-threshold working limits — activity / parameter / stop threshold / owner

rows.title: Blade rope access lacked a wind stop limit
rows.description: Rope-access blade work had no documented wind-speed stop threshold before this review.

rows.title: No lightning hold criterion for tower climbs
rows.description: Tower-climb activities had no defined lightning stand-down distance.

rows.control: Schedule weather-sensitive work to forecast low-wind windows
Real-time anemometer with automated stop alert at the threshold

rows.action: Publish the weather-threshold matrix in every relevant permit
Integrate the anemometer stop alert with the permit system

sections.text: Work must stop and personnel descend whenever a defined weather-stop threshold is reached or forecast within the work window.
